name: Greek-Flavoured Chinese Style Chicken
recipeIngredient: Whole chicken breast, boned, skinned and cut into 3/4-inch pieces
Dry oregano (2 teaspoons), rubbed between palms
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large skillet, heat butter over medium heat.
3. Add minced garlic and dry oregano, rubbing them together until fragrant.
4. Add diced chicken breast pieces to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
5. Pour in the white wine, ensuring it covers the chicken pieces.
6. Reduce heat to low and place the skillet in the preheated oven.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the liquid has evaporated.
8. Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in paprika and lemon pepper.
9. Serve hot with your choice of side dishes.
